author: HunteRoi <me@tinaeldevresse.eu> (https://tinaeldevresse.eu/)
description: Based on Androz2091's package, this is a simple framework to facilitate the creation of a temporary voice & text channels system using Discord.js
name: @hunteroi/discord-temp-channels

scripts.prepublish: yarn lint && yarn build && yarn build:docs
scripts.start: yarn build && tsc ./examples/index.ts --target esnext --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext && node ./examples/index.js
scripts.start:2: yarn build && tsc ./examples/index2.ts --target esnext --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext && node ./examples/index2.js
